title: Bipolar & Lithium Mastery
content: • Dx: Manic Episode: Sleeping little (>1wk), pressured speech. • Risk: Lithium Toxicity: Precipitated by NSAIDs (Advil). • Tx: Dialysis if Li level >4.

title: Personality Clusters
content:
• Cluster A (Weird): Paranoid (Accusatory), Schizoid (Aloof).
• Cluster B (Wild): Antisocial (Bad), Borderline (Instability), Histrionic (flamBoyant).
• Cluster C (Worried): Avoidant (Cowardly), OCPD (Compulsive).

title: APGAR & Birth Injuries
content: • Dx: APGAR: 1 min (labor tolerance), 5 min (resuscitation). Does NOT predict neuro outcome. • Dx: Erb-Duchenne (C5-C6): Waiters tip arm. • Tx: Clavicular Fracture: No tx needed.

title: Consent & Capacity
content: • Risk: Adult Refusal: Do not override a capable adult even if life-saving. • Rule: Mature Minor: Consent is capacity-based, not age-based in Canada. • Risk: Child Abuse: Report immediately on suspicion.
